title: Structure PVP
body:
Terrain-based super-assembly PVP game \
### How to play
The first time to use the data, please follow the tips:
1. Create a void world and add the datapack to your world
2. Create the lobby by the steps after using
```
function structurepvp:init
```
3. Call your friends with you to play the game
4. Press the `Join as a Player` to join the game
5. Press the `Start Game`
6. You will have 60 seconds to choice a place to spawn after the map generated
7. Fight! The last surviving player will be the winner
### Tips
1. You can modify the equipments in creative mode after you created the lobby (Keep the facing direction of the shulker boxes unchanged, otherwise you may be not able to open it when the game started)
2. All players will be glowed permanently without invisibility effect
3. The location of lobby will determine the terrains

### Thanks for playing
